parameters.content:
The problem with a plain "HTTP Request Tool" here
A Tool node the AI Agent calls needs to be a single, self-contained unit. But search_product isn't actually one step — it's three: build_search_domain (Code) → the Odoo HTTP call → rank_results (Code). A bare HTTP Request Tool node can't run that Code logic before and after itself. Same problem for get_product_details, which needs the normalize_product_details Code node after it to handle the false-sentinel correctly.
If we tried to cram this into a single HTTP node, we'd lose multi-word matching and the false-sentinel fix — both things we specifically built and tested.
